subcodes.first_line: O valiant companion and steadfast supporter! Thou who art distinguished by bravery and courage, a warrior of the field of battle and a lion-hearted champion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهادر یار و یاورن بهادِر بهادرى و دلیرى و مرد میدانى و شیر گیر ولى ما را
subcodes.subjects: @alchemy; the elixir, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
